name: Abatement of Jeopardy Assessment

eligibility.description: Available to any taxpayer subject to a jeopardy assessment under Section 6861 where the IRS's belief that collection is in jeopardy is factually incorrect.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Taxpayers can request the Secretary to abate a jeopardy assessment if they can demonstrate that jeopardy does not actually exist, effectively reversing the immediate demand for payment.
